findings.blocker: meta.ai requires login BEFORE accepting any prompt. Clicking send button triggers login modal (Korean: 'Meta AI-reul choedae-hwal-yong-haeboseyo. modeun Meta AI gineung-e accessha-go girok-eseo prompt-reul boryeomyeon login-hageona account-reul mandeuseyo'). Prompt text remained unsent.
findings.note: filter=graphql returned 0 of 13 requests. No meta_graphql POST was issued. Envelope delivery could not be exercised because the client-side gate (login modal) intercepts submission before any network request reaches the h2 endpoint.

status_detail: BLOCKED by client-side login gate. Test PC does not have a logged-in meta.ai session; meta.ai's unauthenticated flow shows a login modal on send-click, preventing any prompt POST to the GraphQL endpoint. Consequently, the 339B envelope validation cannot be attempted in this state. To unblock: (a) establish logged-in session on test PC, or (b) mark meta as not-testable-without-auth in services=127 registry and remove from Batch A cycle. No warning was rendered because the request path to APF was not reached.
errors: meta.ai unauthenticated flow requires login before prompt submission; autonomous test PC has no credentials configured
